title: Abu Dhabi Police arrest 375 for fake posts and illegal filming with fines up to Dh1 million and jail
summary_full: Abu Dhabi Police arrested 375 individuals for filming sensitive incidents and spreading false information online amid regional tensions. Authorities emphasized that such actions risk public panic and national security, leading to strict enforcement of cybercrime laws with severe penalties for violations.
